trait.name: Augmented Reflexes
entries: The guard has advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects that deal area damage.

trait.name: Enhanced Combat Training
entries: The guard adds 2 to damage rolls with melee and ranged attacks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The guard makes three melee or ranged attacks.

action.name: Plasma Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) slashing damage plus 6 ({@damage 1d10}) fire damage.

action.name: Shock Gauntlet
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) lightning damage. The target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Heavy Bolter Rifle
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8} to hit, range 120/400 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d10 + 4}) piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 1d8}) force damage.

reaction.name: Kinetic Shield (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The guard activates a temporary energy shield, gaining resistance to all damage until the start of its next turn.
